use_cases: Automatically adjusting textarea height as user types to fit content without scrolling
Creating dynamic form fields that grow with user input in comment or feedback forms
Implementing chat message inputs with auto-expanding text areas
Building rich text editors or note-taking interfaces with fluid text containers
Replacing fixed-height textarea with responsive alternatives in any form application
ai_summary: A React hook utility that automatically resizes textarea elements based on their content. It calculates minimum height from line height and specified rows, then adjusts the textarea height in real-time using useLayoutEffect for immediate visual feedback. This hook is useful for creating auto-expanding text inputs in forms, chat interfaces, and content creation tools.
